description: Refactor PRM from local-first macOS Electron+FastAPI to cloud-based multi-platform personal relationship manager

tasks.description: Initialize Turborepo monorepo structure
steps: Verify turbo.json exists with pipeline config
Verify pnpm-workspace.yaml includes apps/* and packages/*

tasks.description: Create apps/web as Next.js 16 (latest) app with App Router
steps: Configure App Router in app/ directory
Run `pnpm dev` and verify localhost:3000 loads

tasks.description: Create apps/electron scaffold (minimal, sync-only)
steps: Create apps/electron with electron-vite or electron-forge
Set up main process in src/main/

tasks.description: Create packages/ui with shadcn/ui setup and full CSS variable configuration
steps: Run `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init` with New York style and zinc base color
Configure globals.css with all CSS variables: --background, --foreground, --card, --popover, --primary, --secondary, --muted, --accent, --destructive, --border, --input, --ring
Add chart CSS variables: --chart-1 through --chart-5 for both light and dark themes
Add button component as test: `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add button`
Export components from package index with consistent @/components/ui import paths

tasks.description: Verify shadcn/ui configuration across monorepo
steps: Verify packages/ui/components.json exists with correct aliases: { '@/components': './src/components', '@/lib': './src/lib' }
Verify apps/web can import from @repo/ui package
Verify tailwind.config.ts extends packages/ui theme variables
Verify CSS variables include sidebar-* and chart-* in both :root and .dark
Test dark mode toggle applies all variable changes correctly
Run `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck` to verify no import errors

tasks.description: Create packages/shared with phone normalization utils
steps: Add unit tests for phone normalization

tasks.description: Create packages/convex and initialize Convex project
Define Convex schema: users table
steps: Add users table to schema.ts with workosUserId, email, name, plan fields
Run `npx convex dev` and verify schema deploys

tasks.description: Define Convex schema: integrations table
steps: Add integrations table with userId, platform, pipedreamAccountId, syncState fields
Deploy and verify in Convex dashboard

tasks.description: Define Convex schema: contacts and contactHandles tables
steps: Add contacts table with userId, displayName, company, notes, importance fields
Add contactHandles table with userId, contactId, handleType, handle, platform fields

tasks.description: Define Convex schema: conversations table
steps: Add conversations table with userId, platform, platformConversationId, conversationType fields
Add index by_user_last_message for inbox sorting

tasks.description: Define Convex schema: messages table with search index
steps: Add messages table with userId, conversationId, platform, content, sentAt fields
Add full-text search index on content field
Add index by_conversation for message retrieval
Add attachments array field (type, filename, mimeType, size, storageId)
Add reactions array field (emoji, contactId, timestamp)
Add status field (sent, delivered, read, failed)
Deploy and verify search index in dashboard

tasks.description: Define Convex schema: actions table
steps: Add actions table with userId, type, status, priority fields
Add conversationId, contactId, messageId optional reference fields
Add index by_user_status for action queue queries

tasks.description: Install WorkOS AuthKit and Convex auth packages
Create Convex auth config and WorkOS auth routes
steps: Create convex/auth.config.ts with WorkOS JWT provider using @convex-dev/workos
Create app/callback/route.ts with GET handler from handleAuth()
Create app/sign-in/route.ts with GET handler from handleAuth()
Create app/sign-up/route.ts with GET handler from handleAuth()
Run `npx convex dev` to deploy auth config

tasks.description: Create middleware and ConvexClientProvider
Test auth flow end-to-end with Convex
steps: Click sign-in button and complete WorkOS OAuth flow
Verify JWT token passed to Convex via useAuthFromAuthKit
Query Convex with authenticated user context (ctx.auth.getUserIdentity)
Sign out and verify redirect to marketing page
Sign in again and verify redirect to (app) routes

tasks.description: Create basic marketing page layout
steps: Import UI components from @repo/ui with consistent @/ aliases
Add navigation with Sign In button linking to /sign-in
Style with Tailwind CSS using shadcn/ui CSS variables

tasks.description: Create authenticated app shell with sidebar using shadcn/ui sidebar component
steps: Run `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add sidebar` in packages/ui
Create app/(app)/layout.tsx with SidebarProvider and AppSidebar
Import sidebar components from @repo/ui using consistent @/ aliases
Add navigation items: Inbox, Actions, Assistant, Contacts, Settings using SidebarMenu
Show user avatar and name from WorkOS session using SidebarFooter
Add sign out button in SidebarFooter
Verify sidebar uses --sidebar-* CSS variables for theming
Verify layout renders for authenticated users with collapsible sidebar

tasks.description: Create packages/integrations with iMessage types
steps: Define iMessage types: Message, Chat, Handle, SyncBatch

tasks.description: Port chat_db.py logic to TypeScript in Electron
steps: Port getMessagesSince query with ROWID cursor
Add unit tests for SQL queries

tasks.description: Extract reactions and message status from chat.db
steps: Query message.associated_message_guid for tapback reactions (loved, liked, laughed, etc.)
Parse message.is_delivered, is_read, is_sent, is_from_me for status
Handle failed messages via message.error code
Verify reactions and status sync correctly with real messages

tasks.description: Sync iMessage attachments with thumbnail generation
steps: Query attachment table joined with message_attachment_join for file metadata
Generate thumbnails for images/videos (max 400px, preserve aspect ratio)
Handle HEIC to JPEG conversion for web compatibility
Upload original and thumbnail to Convex storage
Store attachment metadata: filename, mimeType, size, storageId, thumbnailStorageId
Verify attachments display correctly in web UI with real photos and videos

tasks.description: Port contact resolver to TypeScript in Electron
steps: Use Swift CLI (prm-contacts) for fast contact fetching from Contacts.app
Map phone numbers to contact names

tasks.description: Create Electron auth flow (WorkOS device auth)
steps: Store auth token securely in macOS Keychain
Show login prompt on first launch
Verify token persists across app restarts

tasks.description: Implement proactive WorkOS token refresh in Electron
steps: Check token expiry before each API call (refresh if <5 min remaining)
Handle 401 errors by refreshing token and retrying request once
Use WorkOS refresh token flow to get new access token
Update stored token in Keychain after refresh
Add logging for token refresh events
Verify long-running sync (148k messages) completes without auth errors

tasks.description: Create /api/sync/imessage POST endpoint
steps: Validate auth token from Authorization header
Call Convex mutation to upsert messages

tasks.description: Create Convex mutation syncMessages for batch upsert
steps: Resolve sender handles to contact IDs
Test by syncing real iMessage data from Electron app

tasks.description: Create Convex mutation syncContacts for contact upsert
steps: Test by syncing real contacts from macOS Contacts.app

tasks.description: Implement incremental contacts sync from macOS Contacts.app
steps: Watch for CNContactStoreDidChange notifications in Electron main process
Re-sync modified contacts on change detection
Add periodic full sync fallback (hourly) using setInterval
Verify contact updates propagate to Convex within 5 seconds of change

tasks.description: Store contacts sync state in Convex for recovery
steps: Store lastContactsSyncAt timestamp in Convex integrations table
Store contactsCount to detect bulk additions/deletions
On Electron launch, fetch remote contacts sync state
If no remote state or count mismatch >10%, trigger full contacts sync
Include contacts in 'Force Full Sync' recovery flow (task 2.8a)
Verify contacts re-sync works after clearing local cache

tasks.description: Implement incremental sync with ROWID cursor
steps: Store lastSyncCursor in Convex integrations table
API returns new cursor after successful sync
Verify only new messages synced on subsequent runs

tasks.description: Handle sync state recovery and full re-sync scenarios
steps: On Electron launch, fetch remote sync state from Convex integrations table
Compare remote message cursor with local chat.db max ROWID to detect gaps
If local cache cleared or fresh install, trigger full sync (messages + contacts)
Add 'Force Full Sync' button in Electron settings for manual recovery
Store sync metadata: lastSyncAt, totalMessagesSynced, totalContactsSynced, syncVersion
Detect schema changes (syncVersion mismatch) and trigger re-sync of both
Verify full re-sync (messages + contacts) works after deleting local cache

tasks.description: Optimize message sync performance (target: 1000+ msgs/sec)
steps: Profile current bottleneck: Electron read, network, or Convex mutation
Parallelize batch uploads (send multiple batches concurrently)
Increase batch size if network latency is bottleneck (test 5000-10000)
Add bulk insert optimization in Convex mutation if DB writes are slow
Add progress indicator in Electron UI for large syncs
Benchmark full sync of 148k messages completes in under 3 minutes

tasks.description: Port inbox UI to packages/ui/unified-inbox
steps: Port ConversationList component from existing frontend

tasks.description: Create Convex query getInbox with pagination
steps: Test query with your synced messages and verify expected shape

tasks.description: Create conversation detail view
steps: Render message thread with sender names
Style sent vs received messages differently

tasks.description: Test full sync cycle: Electron → API → Convex → UI
steps: Verify messages appear in Convex dashboard
Open web app and verify inbox shows messages
Click conversation and verify messages load

tasks.description: Create database reset and full reseed script for testing
steps: Create script to drop all Convex data (messages, conversations, contacts, contactHandles)
Clear sync cursors and metadata in integrations table
Clear local Electron cache (contacts cache, sync state)
Trigger automatic full re-sync of messages and contacts
Verify sync completes without manual intervention
Add npm script: pnpm reset-and-reseed for easy invocation
Document usage in README for development testing

tasks.description: Port create_action tool to TypeScript

steps: Query Convex actions table with filters: status, type, contactId, conversationId

Return action details: type, status, reason, draftMessage, related contact/conversation
Enable queries like 'What follow-ups do I have pending?' or 'Show actions for John'

tasks.description: Batch process all messages to extract Mem0 memories

Track lastMemoryProcessedAt cursor in integrations table
Extract memories from message content using Mem0 add() API
Associate memories with contactId for person-specific recall
Rate limit API calls to avoid Mem0 limits (batch ~100 msgs/min)
Create manual trigger endpoint for initial backfill
Verify memories are searchable after processing real conversations

tasks.description: Automatically extract Mem0 memories from new messages on sync
steps: Hook into syncMessages mutation to trigger memory extraction
Queue new messages for Mem0 processing (avoid blocking sync)
Create Convex action/scheduled function to process memory queue
Extract facts using Mem0 add() with contactId as user_id
Dedupe: skip messages already processed (track memoryExtractedAt on message)
Handle rate limits gracefully with exponential backoff
Verify new conversations automatically generate searchable memories
